title: matelea fruticosa
intro: Matelea fruticosa, a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, is a type of vine native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. Some of the health benefits associated with Matelea fruticosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and infections. Herbal preparations of Matelea fruticosa can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
